authenticate(ContactlessKeyMode, byte[], byte, byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.external.contactless.ExtM1Card
Authenticates M1 card with the specified key after the card is activated and before reading/writing the card..

Deprecated.
Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.authenticate()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
authenticate(ContactlessKeyMode, byte[], byte, byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card

Replaced by "MifareClassicCard.authenticate()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
